predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: A nuclear weapon will be used in Ukraine.
predictions.context: Chad references a prediction Bob made on January 29th that a nuke would be used in Ukraine within 30-40 days. Bob does not retract it when challenged.

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: Donald Trump will be found guilty of at least one of the 34 felony counts and will go to jail.
predictions.context: When asked if Trump will be found guilty, Haley says 'I think he's going to go to jail' and 'If it was ever going to happen, it's going to be now.'

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump is arrested and put in jail, people will storm the jail, there will be dead people (Democrats/FBI), and 'the war has started.'
predictions.context: Bob states that if Trump goes to jail, 'the jail will go down and smoke' and that 'death will happen.' He elaborates that people will attack and kill those holding him.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump is put in jail, that will be the start of a Civil War.
predictions.context: Mary Lou states 'He will not go to jail. They are too scared to do that because that will be the Civil War.'

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Trump is found guilty, 'We're just going to take over the country. You guys don't have anything to say about it. You're speechless. You have no voice. You have no vote.'
predictions.context: When asked what will happen if Trump is found guilty, Bob predicts a conservative takeover, eliminating the political voice of the left.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Black people in America 'are going to regret the fact that they brought that shit up.'
predictions.context: During a debate about race and the Tennessee Three, Bob makes a forward-looking claim about consequences for Black people 'bringing up' the race issue.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: These podcast episodes are 'going to get crazier and crazier as we enter this era where Trump is now going to have to go face trial' and with 'the presidential campaigns heating up.'
predictions.context: In his closing remarks, Chad forecasts the tone and content of future episodes based on upcoming political events.
predictions.timeframe: over the coming months (leading to 2024 election)
